metadata.description: YapCut by alexmuresan.com: a two-part short-form content engine. Outlier Radar researches your niche, finds videos that went viral, and writes weekly ready-to-film scripts to a tracked dashboard. The TikTok Yap Editor turns your raw phone clips into finished vertical videos, talking-head or day-in-the-life. Both are creator-agnostic via a one-time discovery interview.

plugins.name: outlier-radar
plugins.description: Weekly viral-outlier research + ideation engine. Learns your niche once, finds short-form videos that beat their creator's baseline 5x+, extracts the transferable hook/format mechanic, and writes ~10 scripts per lane (your Industry lane + a Viral-videos reach lane) in your voice to a self-contained tracked dashboard.

plugins.name: tiktok-yap-editor
plugins.description: Turn raw phone clips into finished vertical TikTok/Reels/Shorts. Mode A talking-head: transcript-first cut, zero dead air, brand captions, an auto-fitted on-screen hook that never clips, automatic stutter/restart catching. Mode B day-in-the-life: script the voiceover, lock picture to b-roll, record to a guide. Brand-agnostic via first-run discovery.
